memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Griffith

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan於1325年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Madoc ap Meuric of Coity25歲，母親Gwladus ferch Griffith32歲。他於1335年與Joan Verch RHUN結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在愛爾蘭被列為knight of the holy sepulchre。他去世於1369年在威爾士布洛可爾迪納斯享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan于1325年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Madoc ap Meuric of Coity25岁，母亲Gwladus ferch Griffith32岁。他于1335年与Joan Verch RHUN结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在爱尔兰被列为knight of the holy sepulchre。他去世于1369年在威尔士布洛可爾迪納斯享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Gethyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from a lenited adjectival form of the byname Cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

variants.name: Gethen
meanings: Traditional: from a lenited adjectival form of the byname Cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan was born in 1325, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Madoc ap Meuric of Coity, was 25 and his mother, Gwladus ferch Griffith, was 32. He married Joan Verch RHUN in 1335. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as knight of the holy sepulchre in Ireland. He died in 1369, in Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan est né en 1325, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Madoc ap Meuric of Coity, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Gwladus ferch Griffith, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan Verch RHUN en 1335. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est knight of the holy sepulchre à Irlande. Il est décédé en 1369, à Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan 1325 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madoc ap Meuric of Coity 25 und seine Mutter Gwladus ferch Griffith 32. Er hat 1335 Joan Verch RHUN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als knight of the holy sepulchre in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb 1369 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan è nato il nel 1325 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Madoc ap Meuric of Coity, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Gwladus ferch Griffith, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan Verch RHUN nel 1335. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come knight of the holy sepulchre nel Irlanda. Morì nel 1369, nel Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardiganが1325年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Madoc ap Meuric of Coityは25歳，母Gwladus ferch Griffithは32歳であった。1335年にJoan Verch RHUNと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。アイルランドでの職業はknight of the holy sepulchreと記録されている。彼は1369年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアディナスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan(이)가 1325년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madoc ap Meuric of Coity(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladus ferch Griffith(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1335년 Joan Verch RHUN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 knight of the holy sepulchre이었다. 그는 1369년 웨일스 p브로케실르 딘아스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan nasceu em 1325, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Madoc ap Meuric of Coity, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Gwladus ferch Griffith, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Verch RHUN em 1335. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como knight of the holy sepulchre em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 1369, em Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan родился в 1325 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Madoc ap Meuric of Coity было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladus ferch Griffith, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Verch RHUN в 1335 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии knight of the holy sepulchre в местности Ирландия. Он умер в 1369 г. в местности динас, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gruffydd Gethyn ap Madog Lord of Cardigan nació en 1325, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Madoc ap Meuric of Coity, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Gwladus ferch Griffith, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan Verch RHUN en 1335. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era knight of the holy sepulchre en Irlanda. Murió en 1369, en Dinas, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 44 años.
